title: Python Variables and Print
simple: A variable is like a labeled box. You can keep words or numbers inside the box and use it later.
advanced: A variable binds a name to an object in memory. Python is dynamically typed, so the name can point to different object types over time.
explanation: This lesson introduces assignment and output. Students learn how values are stored and displayed.
lineExplanations: Line 1: Create a variable called name and store the text "Asha".
Line 2: Create a variable called age and store the number 10.
Line 3: Print the value stored in name.
Line 4: Print the value stored in age.
